name: finhay-skills-hub
description: Agent skills for the Finhay Securities Open API — stock prices, funds, gold, macro data, trading accounts, portfolios, and order execution

metadata.description: Finhay skills for Vietnamese stock market data, personal brokerage account queries, and stock order execution via Finhay Securities Open API

plugins.name: finhay-skills-hub
plugins.description: 3 skills — market data (stocks, funds, gold, silver, crypto, macro, charts), trading account data (balances, portfolio, orders, PnL), and order execution (place/modify/cancel stock orders, 2FA-gated)
